basic_details.job_title: GBPUAT Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: G. B. Pant University of Agriculture & Technology
basic_details.short_information: G. B. Pant University of Agriculture & Technology (GBPUAT) Project Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 05 May 2026 on the official website of GBPUAT. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the GBPUAT Project Assistant Recruitment 2026. Candidates who have Graduation in any discipline along with relevant work experience are eligible to apply for these Project Assistant vacancies. The offline application process for GBPUAT Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 has started and will remain open until 15 May 2026. Candidates can download the official notification PDF and apply of

qualification.details: Graduation in any discipline. Two years working experience in knowledge of field layout, wheat disease diagnosis and data recording. Good knowledge of computer. Should have skills to conduct survey independently at farmer's field.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for GBPUAT Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the GBPUAT Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the GBPUAT Project Assistant recruitment is 15th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Assistant position will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 18,000.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Graduation degree in any discipline to be eligible for the Project Assistant post.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Assistant post at G. B. Pant University of Agriculture & Technology.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their application form to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selection of candidates for the Project Assistant post will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is No.CA/PLP/..1.0.30.

faq.question: Q9. What is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The job is located in Pantnagar, Uttarakhand, with the pincode 263145.

faq.question: Q10. Does the notification mention any age relaxation?
faq.answer: The provided data does not specify any age relaxation details. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for comprehensive information on age limits and relaxation policies.
